caption: A man with short dark hair and facial stubble is recording in a studio with grey acoustic foam walls. He wears over-the-ear black headphones and a black long-sleeved shirt over a grey undershirt. He is positioned behind a professional condenser microphone mounted on a black boom arm. In the beginning, he looks toward his right with a slight smile. He then shifts his gaze forward, looking directly toward the camera. As the sequence continues, he raises his right hand and gestures with his fingers while looking slightly downward. Finally, he rests his right arm on the boom arm of the microphone, looking back toward his right. The setting remains static throughout the clip, focusing on the man's facial expressions and upper body movements as he interacts with his environment.
